description: Lido Dual Governance Smart contracts fork to Hardhat 3.

reset files & cache.command: git checkout -- test/unit/scripts/launch/TimeConstraints.t.sol test/scenario/mainnet-launch.t.sol contracts/types/Timestamp.sol && npx hardhat clean

edit & compile Solidity test with min de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/unit/scripts/launch/TimeConstraints.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity test with max de.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> test/scenario/mainnet-launch.t.sol && npx hardhat compile

edit & compile Solidity contract: contra.command: printf "\n// hardhat benchmark edit\n" >> contracts/types/Timestamp.sol && npx hardhat compile
